headline: Following Amadou Onana
body: 🚨💣 Aston Villa now seriously trying to hijack the imminent NUFC deal. Fresh contact today as reported. Still no final commitment from the player to Newcastle. Following Amadou Onana’s injury, Aston Villa have now made an XXL offer to both the player and SC Freiburg. Decision soon. Florian Plettenberg (Plettigoal) 🚨⤵️ Aston Villa were fully in the race, as exclusively revealed, and are still hoping for a chance with fresh contact. However, NUFC remain hopeful of receiving the green light. Full agreement with SC Freiburg in place. It’s now up to the player. Decision very soon. —
raw_text:
🚨💣 Aston Villa now seriously trying to hijack the imminent #NUFC deal. Fresh contact today as reported. Still no final commitment from the player to Newcastle. Following Amadou Onana’s injury, Aston Villa have now made an XXL offer to both the player and SC Freiburg. Decision soon.


Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨⤵️ Aston Villa were fully in the race, as exclusively revealed, and are still hoping for a chance with fresh contact. However, #NUFC remain hopeful of receiving the green light. Full agreement with SC Freiburg in place. It’s now up to the player. Decision very soon.



— https://nitter.net/Plettigoal/status/2076365603359555877#m
